What makes this interesting is how quickly sentiment changed: • Earlier this week, oil dumped after optimism around negotiations. • Then military escalation pushed oil back higher again • Now traders are trying to price in whether this deal actually survives Personally, my oil outlook is becoming slightly more bearish IF the agreement gets finalized because supply fears would likely cool down quickly. But if negotiations suddenly fail again, I still think oil could reclaim strong bullish momentum fast due to renewed Hormuz risks. That’s why I’m still watching $WTI closely on Bitget this weekend.
